path: Problem: Return the header(s) corresponding to the smallest positive value in a row, concatenating ties with a delimiter
Action: Use MIN with an IF filter to find the minimum value meeting a condition, then IF to flag matching positions, then TEXTJOIN to concatenate matching headers

Observation: Filtering the row to values > 0 before MIN ignores blanks/zeros; comparing the row to that minimum identifies all tied minima; TEXTJOIN can skip empty strings to return only matching headers
